mapper.select: SELECT q.id, q.category_id, c.category_name, q.question_no, q.question_code, q.title, q.answer_summary, q.keywords, q.difficulty, q.estimated_minutes, q.score_full_mark, q.score_pass_mark, q.ai_score_enabled, q.self_assessment_enabled, q.view_count, COALESCE(p.study_count, q.study_count, 0) AS study_count, COALESCE(p.check_count, q.check_count, 0) AS check_count, COALESCE(p.study_status, 0) AS study_status, COALESCE(p.mastery_level, 0) AS mastery_level, COALESCE(p.review_priority, 3) AS review_priority, COALESCE(p.is_favorite, 0) AS is_favorite, COALESCE(p.is_wrong_question, 0) AS is_wrong_question, p.last_score, p.last_study_time, p.next_review_time FROM study_user_question_progress p INNER JOIN study_question q ON q.id = p.question_id LEFT JOIN study_category c ON c.id = q.category_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.is_favorite = 1 AND q.status = 1 AND q.review_status = 2 ORDER BY COALESCE(p.last_study_time, p.update_time, p.create_time) DESC, p.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT q.id, q.category_id, c.category_name, q.question_no, q.question_code, q.title, q.answer_summary, q.keywords, q.difficulty, q.estimated_minutes, q.score_full_mark, q.score_pass_mark, q.ai_score_enabled, q.self_assessment_enabled, q.view_count, COALESCE(p.study_count, q.study_count, 0) AS study_count, COALESCE(p.check_count, q.check_count, 0) AS check_count, COALESCE(p.study_status, 0) AS study_status, COALESCE(p.mastery_level, 0) AS mastery_level, COALESCE(p.review_priority, 3) AS review_priority, COALESCE(p.is_favorite, 0) AS is_favorite, COALESCE(p.is_wrong_question, 0) AS is_wrong_question, p.last_score, p.last_study_time, p.next_review_time FROM study_user_question_progress p INNER JOIN study_question q ON q.id = p.question_id LEFT JOIN study_category c ON c.id = q.category_id WHERE p.user_id = #{userId} AND q.status = 1 AND q.review_status = 2 AND ( p.study_status = 3 OR p.is_wrong_question = 1 OR (p.next_review_time IS NOT NULL AND p.next_review_time <= NOW()) ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN p.next_review_time IS NOT NULL AND p.next_review_time <= NOW() THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, COALESCE(p.review_priority, 0) DESC, CASE WHEN p.next_review_time IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, p.next_review_time ASC, COALESCE(p.last_check_time, p.last_study_time, p.update_time, p.create_time) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
